title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Nami, Pudding, Katakuri, Big Mom, Sanji, Luffy as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn, he's a lucky one, that Sanji! If I knew it was gonna be with a babe like that,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I wouldn't have minded getting married myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to a daughter of big mom? Are you crazy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's being sacrificed. Don't you forget it. Marrying one of her children

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: means spending the rest of your life under big mom's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're surrounded by the Charlotte siblings.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These seats are pretty open and easy to hit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and we're all unarmed. It's curtains for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and so it should be. The germa is an unnecessary nation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's got to have some plan! Can I really put my trust in him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's 'Cause a certain someone decided he needed his beauty sleep, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why are you the one falling down?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, lift the bride's veil and kiss her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, I'm going to lift the veil now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a good look, Sanji! At the horrible sight of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's a good girl now, just...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
